headline: Welltower Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Welltower (NYSE:WELL) reported a strong start to 2026, highlighting record same-store net operating income (NOI) growth, continued operating margin expansion in its seniors housing operating portfolio, and a surge in investment activity amid volatile capital markets.
